name: Peach Cobbler;diebetic
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 1 1/2-quart baking dish.
2. Add peach slices to the melted butter.
3. Mix together the powdered sweetener, flour, skim milk, and baking powder.
4. Pour the mixture over the peach slices. Do not stir.
5. Bake at 375°F until golden brown. Serves 5.
